title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: The Battle Lines are Drawn
description: Eleven decisive factors that will shape the outcome of Kerala’s most consequential election in a generation. The local body elections in December 2025 effectively set the tone for Kerala’s 2026 state assembly elections.
